title: Vietnamese Fermented Rice Bowl
description: A traditional Vietnamese dish made with fermented rice, fresh herbs, and a variety of flavors. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch.

ingredients.name: Fermented rice
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Cook the fermented rice according to the package instructions.
Chop the cilantro and mint leaves.
In a small bowl, mix together the chopped herbs and cacao nibs (if using).
Serve the fermented rice in a bowl and top with the herb mixture.
Add any desired additional toppings, such as sliced scallions or diced cucumbers.
